languages.text: {n}Сержант Данкош прилагает все мыслимые усилия, чтобы научить вас стрелять как они, без прицеливания, на упреждение. К вящему разочарованию всех присутствующих, это ему не удается.{/n}
{n}Sergeant Dankosh puts every conceivable effort into teaching you to shoot as they do — leading the target with no aiming. To the great disappointment of everyone present, he does not succeed.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Сержант Данкош прилагает все мыслимые усилия, чтобы научить вас стрелять как они, без прицеливания, на упреждение. К вящему разочарованию всех присутствующих, это ему не удается.{/n}

{n}Sergeant Dankosh puts every conceivable effort into teaching you to shoot as they do — leading the target with no aiming. To the great disappointment of everyone present, he does not succeed.{/n}

languages.text: {n}丹科什军士使出浑身解数，想教会你像他们那样开枪——无需瞄准，凭预判射击。不过让在场众人大失所望的是，他没能教会你。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Sergeant Dankosh puts every conceivable effort into teaching you to shoot as they do — leading the target with no aiming. To the great disappointment of everyone present, he does not succeed.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}丹科什军士使出浑身解数，想教会你像他们那样开枪——无需瞄准，凭预判射击。不过让在场众人大失所望的是，他没能教会你。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Çavuş Dankosh, sana onların yaptığı gibi nişan almadan hedefi yönlendirerek atış yapmayı öğretmek için akla gelebilecek her türlü çabayı gösteriyor. Orada bulunan herkesi büyük hayal kırıklığına uğratarak başarısız oluyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Sergeant Dankosh puts every conceivable effort into teaching you to shoot as they do — leading the target with no aiming. To the great disappointment of everyone present, he does not succeed.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Çavuş Dankosh, sana onların yaptığı gibi nişan almadan hedefi yönlendirerek atış yapmayı öğretmek için akla gelebilecek her türlü çabayı gösteriyor. Orada bulunan herkesi büyük hayal kırıklığına uğratarak başarısız oluyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Le sergent Dankosh déploie des efforts considérables pour vous apprendre à tirer à la façon des Meroviens : en suivant la cible sans viser. À la grande déception des soldats présents, il n'y parvient pas.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Sergeant Dankosh puts every conceivable effort into teaching you to shoot as they do — leading the target with no aiming. To the great disappointment of everyone present, he does not succeed.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Le sergent Dankosh déploie des efforts considérables pour vous apprendre à tirer à la façon des Meroviens : en suivant la cible sans viser. À la grande déception des soldats présents, il n'y parvient pas.{/n}

languages.text: {n}El sargento Dankosh dedica todos los esfuerzos posibles a enseñarte a disparar igual que ellos, apuntando a la posición futura del objetivo sin mira. Para la gran decepción de todos los presentes, no lo consigue.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Sergeant Dankosh puts every conceivable effort into teaching you to shoot as they do — leading the target with no aiming. To the great disappointment of everyone present, he does not succeed.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}El sargento Dankosh dedica todos los esfuerzos posibles a enseñarte a disparar igual que ellos, apuntando a la posición futura del objetivo sin mira. Para la gran decepción de todos los presentes, no lo consigue.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Sergeant Dankosh lässt nichts unversucht, dich zu lehren, wie Merovianer zu schießen — und die Position des Ziels zu antizipieren. Zur großen Enttäuschung aller Anwesenden allerdings ohne Erfolg.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Sergeant Dankosh puts every conceivable effort into teaching you to shoot as they do — leading the target with no aiming. To the great disappointment of everyone present, he does not succeed.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Sergeant Dankosh lässt nichts unversucht, dich zu lehren, wie Merovianer zu schießen — und die Position des Ziels zu antizipieren. Zur großen Enttäuschung aller Anwesenden allerdings ohne Erfolg.{/n}

languages.text: {n}ダンコシュ軍曹は、あらゆる努力を惜しまず、皆が狙いを定めて撃つのではなく、標的を先読みして撃つ方法を教えます。しかし、残念ながら、皆の期待を裏切るように、彼は成功しません。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Sergeant Dankosh puts every conceivable effort into teaching you to shoot as they do — leading the target with no aiming. To the great disappointment of everyone present, he does not succeed.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}ダンコシュ軍曹は、あらゆる努力を惜しまず、皆が狙いを定めて撃つのではなく、標的を先読みして撃つ方法を教えます。しかし、残念ながら、皆の期待を裏切るように、彼は成功しません。{/n}
